EmailTemplate.name: AN - New Compliance Requirement
EmailTemplate.subject: We need a few more documents to support your application
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WE NEED A FEW MORE DOCUMENTS.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
in order to proceed your recent application with us, we need a few more documents from you.
Please head over to the portal to get started!
OPEN THE ALLIANCE PORTAL
if you have any questions you can always call our friendly staff on 1300 034 494.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
